response:
module 1: define the component structure and props  
the component is a functional component that takes an array of records as a prop. it uses the records array to render a table with sortable columns for id, name, and age.  

module 2: implement sorting functionality  
the component allows sorting by id, name, and age in both ascending and descending order. it uses the sort function with a comparator to handle the sorting.  

module 3: implement filtering functionality  
the component includes a filter input that allows case-insensitive partial matches on the name field. it filters the records array based on the input value.  

module 4: ensure performance and user experience  
the component uses efficient sorting and filtering algorithms to maintain performance even with 10,000 records. it uses virtualization to render only visible rows and avoids unnecessary re-renders. player
